assessmentHistory.supplementalSource: Nebraska Taxes Online statement detail modal
notes: When a GWorks PDF only includes current/prior assessed values, open Nebraska Taxes Online by parcel and use each year’s View Details modal to capture assessed valuation components for the 2019-current cycle.
Use Zillow by situs address only as a fallback for visible assessment totals when the Nebraska Taxes Online detail modal is unavailable.
Do not use Zillow tax amounts; Zillow rounds those values. Use Nebraska Taxes Online or county tax statements for tax-history amounts.
Click each year’s View Details modal to capture gross tax, credit breakdown, net tax, assessed valuations, payment ledger totals, and levy distribution.
Trim parcel/tax history older than 2019 in the taxpayer-facing record to keep the six-year-cycle view readable.
The current demo record still includes guidedSnapshot as app-ready data.
A production adapter should map raw MIPS fields into a canonical property record, then generate the guided snapshot from domain logic.
